title: The Solar Chronicles
logline: In the vastness of space, where stars shine bright and lonely, humanity discovers an ancient secret that threatens to destroy all that we hold dear.

acts.summary: Astronomers discover anomalies in star patterns that hint at a hidden civilization long ago.
The discovery leads to a race against time as scientists attempt to understand the true nature of the anomalies.
As tensions rise, a group of rebels emerges, determined to uncover the truth before it's too late.

characters.name: Dr. Elara Voss
characters.voice_style: Her voice is calm yet analytical.

characters.name: Captain Orion Blackwood
characters.voice_style: His tone is authoritative and commanding.

world_rules: All life forms must adhere to strict cosmic laws regarding energy consumption and waste production to prevent environmental collapse.
